_comment: Life-state variant: Web Weaver Spider (Adult). Generated from canonical species definition. Prime Directive: this state exists objectively; perception tier determines whether player recognizes it.
description: Full size, full power, territory-holder; cultivates by hunting

perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Sees a territorial beast of web weaver spider kind.
perception_tiers.core_formation: Recognizes species, life-state, and approximate cultivation.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Sees bloodline, mutation potential, and treasure affinity.
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Sees complete ecology and Dao-comprehension state.
